login.title: PedidosWeb
parametros.column.caption: Description
parametros.pedidosWeb.ArticulosPrecioCer: When enabled, the portal allows loading lines whose price in the selected list is zero. When disabled, the system rejects or warns according to load validations.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ArticulosSinPrecio: When enabled, allows loading items with no price defined in the active price list. When disabled, load requires a valid list price.
parametros.pedidosWeb.CargaRecurrente.to: Defines behavior after saving an order or quote: when enabled, the flow returns to a new load; when disabled, it returns to the list or previous screen per portal implementation.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ClienteLeyenda1.to: When enabled, selecting a customer fills header legend 1 from the customer master legend 1.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ClienteLeyenda2.to: When enabled, selecting a customer fills header legend 2 from the customer master legend 2.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ClienteLeyenda3.to: When enabled, selecting a customer fills header legend 3 from the customer master legend 3.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ClienteLeyenda4.to: When enabled, selecting a customer fills header legend 4 from the customer master legend 4.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ClienteLeyenda5.to: When enabled, selecting a customer fills header legend 5 from the customer master legend 5.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ClientesInhabilita: When enabled, the portal allows operating with customers marked disabled in the ERP. When disabled, those customers are excluded from selection or load.
parametros.pedidosWeb.CodClasifArticulos: Classification code that limits item search and load to that classification only. Zero or empty per ERP convention means no additional filter.
parametros.pedidosWeb.CodMotivoCierreExi: Identifier (`id_motivo`) from catalog `pq_pedidosweb_motivos_cierre` with positive active type. Applied automatically when converting a quote to an order without prompting on screen.
parametros.pedidosWeb.CodPerfilPedidos.t: Commercial profile code assigned by default when initializing order or quote header when the customer does not provide another profile.
parametros.pedidosWeb.CodTransporte.tool: Carrier code proposed in the header when the selected customer has no default carrier in the master.
parametros.pedidosWeb.DetallePorMail.too: When enabled, notification email on save or update includes the lines table plus the header block. When disabled, only the header is sent (no item table).
Number of days backward considered when building customer account queries or summaries in the portal.
parametros.pedidosWeb.DiasVentasDetallad: Number of prior sales days the portal requests or shows when querying the customer commercial history (MVP Must query).
parametros.pedidosWeb.FechaControl.toolt: Reference date-time mark controlling which web orders in edit can be downloaded to the ERP during sync or batch lock processes.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ListaPrecios.toolt: Price list code proposed in the header when the customer has no list assigned in the commercial record.
parametros.pedidosWeb.MailDestinatariosA: Email addresses receiving copy of notifications on save or update, besides recipients from customer/user. Canonical separator semicolon (`;`); runtime also tolerates comma.
parametros.pedidosWeb.Mail_DireccionRemi: Email address shown as sender (`From`) in portal commercial emails (save/update documents). Must be a valid address authorized on the SMTP server.
parametros.pedidosWeb.MinutosAviso.toolt: Minute margin used by ERP download or sync processes to warn before taking a web order in edit. Main consumption in ERP, not MVP portal.
parametros.pedidosWeb.MinutosBloqueo.too: Minute window the ERP uses to lock or reserve web orders in edit during download to the central system. Main consumption in ERP.
parametros.pedidosWeb.MinutosWeb.caption: Web inactivity minutes
parametros.pedidosWeb.MinutosWeb.tooltip: Allowed inactivity minutes before portal session expires (GEN-02) and, for orders in status -1, edit lock validity window measured from `fechahora_ultima_actividad`.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ModificaBonArtS.to: When enabled, supervisor profile (S) can manually edit discount or bonus on each line in the load screen.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ModificaBonArtV.to: When enabled, sales rep (V) can manually edit discount or bonus on each line. Customers (C) never have this capability.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ModificaBonCliS.to: When enabled, supervisor (S) can edit header bonuses from the customer (bonif_1, bonif_2, bonif_3 / bonif_neta per module rules).
parametros.pedidosWeb.ModificaBonCliV.to: When enabled, sales rep (V) can edit customer header bonuses. Customers (C) do not edit commercial header bonuses.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ModificaCondVtaC.t: When enabled, customer profile (C) can change payment terms in the document header.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ModificaCondVtaS.t: When enabled, supervisor (S) can change payment terms in the header.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ModificaCondVtaV.t: When enabled, sales rep (V) can change payment terms in the header.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ModificaDirEntrC.t: When enabled, customer (C) can choose or change delivery address in the header.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ModificaDirEntrS.t: When enabled, supervisor (S) can change delivery address in the header.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ModificaDirEntrV.t: When enabled, sales rep (V) can change delivery address in the header.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ModificaExpresoC.t: When enabled, customer (C) can edit courier and associated address in the header.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ModificaExpresoS.t: When enabled, supervisor (S) can edit courier and address in the header.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ModificaExpresoV.t: When enabled, sales rep (V) can edit courier and address in the header.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ModificaListaPrecS: When enabled, supervisor (S) can change price list in the header. Customers (C) cannot change list or prices.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ModificaListaPrecV: When enabled, sales rep (V) can change price list in the header.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ModificaNivelC.too: When enabled, customer (C) can edit commercial level in the document header.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ModificaNivelDeskt: Parameter reserved for desktop ERP client. Not consumed by MVP web portal; kept for Tango/ERP suite compatibility.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ModificaNivelS.too: When enabled, supervisor (S) can edit commercial level in the header.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ModificaNivelV.too: When enabled, sales rep (V) can edit commercial level in the header.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ModificaPrecioS.to: When enabled, supervisor (S) can manually edit unit price on lines.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ModificaPrecioV.to: When enabled, sales rep (V) can manually edit unit price on lines. Customers (C) cannot edit prices.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ModificaTranspC.to: When enabled, customer (C) can change carrier in the document header.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ModificaTranspS.to: When enabled, supervisor (S) can change carrier in the header.
parametros.pedidosWeb.ModificaTranspV.to: When enabled, sales rep (V) can change carrier in the header.
parametros.pedidosWeb.MonedaCodigo.toolt: ISO or internal currency code used in portal amount formats (dashboard, emails, queries) when not obtained from another transactional source.
parametros.pedidosWeb.MonedaSimbolo.tool: Symbol shown before amounts on screens and emails (for example `$`). Prepended to the numeric value with the agreed localization format.
parametros.pedidosWeb.NOeliminaPedido.to: When enabled, blocks deleting orders from the portal even if the user has menu permission. When disabled, normal process authorization applies.
parametros.pedidosWeb.NOmodificaPedido.t: When enabled, prevents opening orders for edit from the portal. Useful during ERP close or sync windows.
parametros.pedidosWeb.NivelExtremo.toolt: When enabled, header level field only accepts values 0 and 100. When disabled, the full range from the level master is accepted.
parametros.pedidosWeb.RedistribucionManu: Parameter used by ERP order redistribution processes. Not consumed by MVP web portal.
Code or identifier of invoice book A used by ERP integrations when invoicing web-originated orders. Main consumption in ERP.
Code or identifier of invoice book B for ERP processes linked to web orders.
Code or identifier of invoice book E (export or other regime) for ERP processes linked to web orders.
parametros.pedidosWeb.mailCCO.caption: Global blind copy (BCC)
parametros.pedidosWeb.mailCCO.tooltip: Email addresses included in blind copy (BCC) on all configured commercial sends of the module. May contain several addresses separated by semicolon.
